columns.name: game_id
columns.description: Stable hash of player_count + base_seed + game_index. Joins to all other tables.

columns.name: seed
columns.description: RNG seed used for this game (base_seed + game_index).

columns.name: player_count
columns.description: Number of players (6, 7, or 8). Drives boat parts required and character distribution.

columns.name: outcome
columns.description: 'win' if all required boat parts built before eruption, else 'loss'.

columns.name: rounds_played
columns.description: Total rounds played before win, loss, or timeout.

columns.name: boat_parts_built
columns.description: Number of boat parts completed when the game ended.

columns.name: boat_parts_required
columns.description: Boat parts needed to win at this player count (3 / 4 / 5).

columns.name: volcano_cards_remaining
columns.description: Volcano deck size at game end. Higher = more time was left when the game ended.

columns.name: mission_failures_any_extra
columns.description: Mission failures caused by a shortage of any-type resources demanded by a complication card.

columns.name: game_id
columns.description: Foreign key to games.game_id.

columns.name: character
columns.description: Character role name (e.g. BUILDER, SAILOR). Enum name, not value.

columns.name: final_score
columns.description: Personal score at game end. Awarded by mission participation and Cook food bonuses.

columns.name: won
columns.description: True if the game's outcome was a win. Duplicated here for convenience so character-centric analysis does not need to join games.csv.

game_resources.grain: one row per (game, resource) pairing (long format)

columns.name: game_id
columns.description: Foreign key to games.game_id.

columns.name: resource
columns.description: Resource type. One of WOOD, STONE, ROPE.

columns.name: consumed
columns.description: Total units of this resource spent on successful missions during the game.

columns.name: mission_failures
columns.description: Count of missions that failed due to insufficient supply of this resource type (base + complication + volcano cost).

game_tools.grain: one row per (game, tool) pairing (long format)

columns.name: game_id
columns.description: Foreign key to games.game_id.

columns.name: tool
columns.description: Tool type. One of KNIFE, VESSEL.

columns.name: repairs
columns.description: Number of times this tool was repaired by a Craftsman during the game.

columns.name: mission_failures_damaged
columns.description: Count of missions that failed because this tool was damaged and unavailable.

character_contributions.grain: one row per (game, character) pairing, win games only

columns.name: game_id
columns.description: Foreign key to games.game_id. Only games with outcome == 'win' appear in this table.

columns.name: character
columns.description: Character role name. Enum name, not value.

columns.name: missions_participated
columns.description: Count of missions this character participated in during the game.

columns.name: boat_missions_participated
columns.description: Subset of missions_participated that were boat-building missions.

columns.name: tools_repaired
columns.description: Count of tool repairs performed by this character (Craftsman-only contribution).

columns.name: lesser_evil_uses
columns.description: Count of lesser-evil trade-off decisions invoked by this character to dodge a complication.

columns.name: requirement_discounts_used
columns.description: Count of times this character's passive or active ability reduced a mission's resource requirement.
